hero.art_prompt: Neha, a 24 year old Indian graduate woman in smart-casual, focused and confident, studying a clean data dashboard on a laptop, modern home, analytical and aspirational.

panels.narration: Neha loved finding patterns and solving problems.
panels.img_prompt: Neha, 24, happily exploring a simple data chart on a laptop at home, curious and analytical, modern room.

panels.narration: But a data science career needed real depth.
panels.img_prompt: Neha looking thoughtful, wondering how to build a data science career, a laptop with a simple chart open, modest room.

panels.narration: Then she found an MCA in Data Science, online.
panels.img_prompt: Neha's face lighting up with excitement at a laptop showing an MCA in Data Science, warm hopeful glow.

panels.narration: She enrolled and began mastering the real craft.
panels.img_prompt: Neha confidently starting her first data science lesson on a laptop, notebook ready, focused and happy, warm light.

turn.title: Why An MCA In Data Science
points: Master the real craft: Python, machine learning, data visualisation and big data.
Apply real AI and analytics tools on hands-on projects from your very first semester.
₹1,60,000 for the full 2-year MCA (₹40,000/semester), with 0% interest EMI or a discount on upfront payment.
A UGC-entitled, NAAC A++ online MCA that tech employers recognise.

testimonials.quote: Real machine-learning projects from semester one made me genuinely job-ready.
